intent_tree: {"处理一个MP3文件并确保音频质量清晰": {"自动找到最新传输的MP3文件": {}, "评估音频文件的质量": {"检查比特率是否符合标准": {}, "检查采样率是否符合标准": {}, "检查音频时长是否合理": {}}, "提供后续操作建议": {}, "将音频内容转录为文字": {"加载语音转文字模型": {}, "执行带时间戳的音频转录": {"检测自然停顿并标注": {}, "生成带时间戳的文本版本": {}}, "保存转录结果到文件": {}}}}
task_graph: {"nodes": [{"id": "Node1", "description": "扫描常见手机传输目录以查找MP3文件"}, {"id": "Node2", "description": "按修改时间排序并选择最新的MP3文件"}, {"id": "Node3", "description": "解析MP3文件的元数据（比特率、采样率、时长）"}, {"id": "Node4", "description": "根据比特率判断音频质量"}, {"id": "Node5", "description": "根据采样率判断音频质量"}, {"id": "Node6", "description": "输出音频时长信息"}, {"id": "Node7", "description": "生成音频质量报告"}, {"id": "Node8", "description": "提示用户后续操作步骤"}, {"id": "Node9", "description": "加载语音转文字模型（Whisper）"}, {"id": "Node10", "description": "执行音频转录并获取单词级时间戳"}, {"id": "Node11", "description": "检测自然停顿（超过0.5秒间隔）"}, {"id": "Node12", "description": "生成带停顿标记的文本"}, {"id": "Node13", "description": "生成带时间戳的完整文本版本"}, {"id": "Node14", "description": "将转录结果保存到文件"}], "links": [{"source": "Node1", "target": "Node2", "type": "selectLatestFile"}, {"source": "Node2", "target": "Node3", "type": "parseMetadata"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node4", "type": "checkBitrate"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node5", "type": "checkSampleRate"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node6", "type": "checkDuration"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node7", "type": "generateReport"}, {"source": "Node5", "target": "Node7", "type": "generateReport"}, {"source": "Node6", "target": "Node7", "type": "generateReport"}, {"source": "Node7", "target": "Node8", "type": "suggestNextSteps"}, {"source": "Node8", "target": "Node9", "type": "loadModel"}, {"source": "Node9", "target": "Node10", "type": "transcribeAudio"}, {"source": "Node10", "target": "Node11", "type": "detectPauses"}, {"source": "Node11", "target": "Node12", "type": "generatePauseMarkedText"}, {"source": "Node10", "target": "Node13", "type": "generateTimestampedText"}, {"source": "Node12", "target": "Node14", "type": "saveTranscription"}, {"source": "Node13", "target": "Node14", "type": "saveTranscription"}]}
